rulings.Case Title: IN RE: CR TITLE SERVICES INC. FKA FIVE STAR SRV CORP.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Order Releasing Deposited Funds, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declarations Of Wayne Seminoff And Jean Achenbach And [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 30, 2016, line 1. CLAIMANT SEMINOFF, WAYNE's Motion For Order Releasing Deposited Funds GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amendment To His Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 30, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BRADLEY's Motion For Leave To File Amendment To His Fourth Amended Complaint GRANTED as follows: Plaintiff shall file Fifth Amended Complaint. Trial date is vacated. Discovery is re-opened. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TONY K FONG VS. HUANZHI JIANG ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 30, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT FEI XU's Amended Notice Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A MENDAROS VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, SUCCESS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Timely Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 30, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Timely Amend continued to July 29, 2016. Moving party to give notice of motion to Mr. Tamer by no later than July 1, 2016. Even though Mr. Tamer's motion to withdraw was granted, no order has been entered and Mr. Tamer remains Plaintiff's counsel of record. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING VS. GEORGIANA WARNER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 30, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING's Motion To Enforce Settlement GRANTED. Defendant entered into the Settlement Agreement while being represented by counsel who "has fully explained to his client the legal effect of this agreement and of the Release and Dismissal with Prejudice and that the settlement and compromise stated here is final and conclusive forthwith." Defendant has shown that she understood what was required of her under the settlement agreement (i.e. payment of money in exchange for dismissal and release) by stating "I hope you know you just stole a bunch of money." Defendant breached the agreement by failing to make the payments as required. = (501/REQ)
